name: Turrican
description: European run-and-gun action-platform series known for large exploratory stages, sci-fi themes, technical polish, and Chris Huelsbeck's music.

eras.title: Amiga and 16-bit Era
eras.description: The core Turrican identity is established across Amiga, Mega Drive, and Super Nintendo.

eras.title: Reissue Era
eras.description: The series returns through modern anthologies and re-releases.
